_comment: Build-time config for index.html (read by the @yuneta/gobj-ui html-transform Vite plugin). title + metadata + Content-Security-Policy connect-src.
title: Yuneta Agent Console

metadata.description: Web console to operate yuneta agents: control-plane CLI, treedb, stats.
metadata.keywords: yuneta agent console cli treedb stats gui

csp_connect_src: _comment: CSP is a BUILD-TIME security boundary. The browser only allows WebSocket/HTTPS connections to the origins listed here. Agent URLs typed by the user in Settings MUST match one of these origins; adding a brand-new agent origin requires adding it here and rebuilding. Keep this list as the single source of allowed origins. Note: 1991 is plain ws (local dev only — blocked as mixed content from the HTTPS prod app), 1993 is wss.
